value.heading: Our Partners
value.subheading: We're always open for new partnerships! Reach out if you'd like to work with us.

value.body: We work with all kinds of mission-aligned nonprofits. If you have an event that needs supporting, or an empty kitchen, let us know and we'll set up a time to meet with you.

items.title: Thomas Dunn Learning Center
items.body: A neighborhood learning center in south St. Louis — one of the places we gather to share community meals and host events together.
